controlify.binding.controlify_splitscree: Press this input on a connected controller to add the controller as a new splitscreen player.
controlify.splitscreen.login.controller_: The host controller you are trying to join for could not be found.
controlify.splitscreen.login.late_login_: Late logins are not allowed on this server.
controlify.splitscreen.login.too_many_re: Server only accepts a maximum of %s-player splitscreen.
controlify.splitscreen.tooltip.unsupport: Server only supports splitscreen up to %s players
